message:
test: update robot-next test for in_progress exclusion from top_picks

The test previously expected robot-next to return an in_progress issue
as the top pick. After the conformance fix (excluding in_progress from
top_picks), when the only actionable issue is in_progress, robot-next
correctly returns no pick.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
